channel.title: Research on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Eric Spencer

item.title: ChatTLA+ Dataset
item.description: The dataset release for the ChatTLA+ paper — SFT corpus and benchmark for TLA+ spec generation, posted anonymized for blind review.

item.title: TLA+ Formal Generation
item.description: Early exploratory repo for generating TLA+ specs from natural-language requirements with an LLM, with a TLC harness wired in. The scaffold that eventually grew into ChatTLA+.

item.title: Researcher
item.description: Research on TLA+ and fine-tuning open-source LLMs for formal methods.

item.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
item.description: Research on AI interpretability and experimental studies involving ChatGPT and advanced Java concepts.

item.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
item.description: Computer Science major with an Information Systems minor.
